positive: A detailed, highly illustrative botanical cross-section of a celestial orchid and glowing moss, rendered in the style of vintage scientific etching and watercolor wash. Include subtle gold leaf accents and intricate linework. Flat lay composition, isolated on a cream background.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, noisy, jpeg artifacts, poor composition
